SYNTHETIC FIXTURE - NOT A RECORDED DEED. For parser testing only.

Part of the Northwest Quarter of Section 7, Township 17 North, Range 3 East,
Hamilton County, Indiana, described as follows:

Beginning at the Point of Beginning;

thence North 12 degrees 15 minutes 30 seconds East, 250.00 feet;
thence North 25 degrees 45 minutes 10 seconds East, 175.00 feet;
thence along a curve to the right having a radius of 500.00 feet, an arc
length of 130.90 feet, and a chord bearing North 33 degrees 15 minutes 10
seconds East, 130.53 feet;
thence North 40 degrees 45 minutes 10 seconds East, 200.00 feet;
thence South 49 degrees 14 minutes 50 seconds East, 175.00 feet;
thence South 30 degrees 00 minutes 00 seconds East, 150.00 feet;
thence South 15 degrees 30 minutes 00 seconds East, 125.00 feet;
thence South 02 degrees 45 minutes 00 seconds East, 200.00 feet;
thence South 88 degrees 30 minutes 00 seconds West, 220.00 feet;
thence along a curve to the left having a radius of 300.00 feet, an arc
length of 156.21 feet, and a chord bearing South 73 degrees 35 minutes 00
seconds West, 154.43 feet;
thence South 58 degrees 40 minutes 00 seconds West, 175.00 feet;
thence North 65 degrees 00 minutes 00 seconds West, 200.00 feet;
thence North 80 degrees 30 minutes 00 seconds West, 150.00 feet;
thence North 02 degrees 15 minutes 00 seconds West, 250.00 feet;
thence North 15 degrees 00 minutes 00 seconds West, 175.00 feet;
thence North 30 degrees 00 minutes 00 seconds West, 200.00 feet;
thence North 45 degrees 00 minutes 00 seconds West, 150.00 feet;
thence North 60 degrees 00 minutes 00 seconds East, 220.00 feet to the Point
of Beginning.
